_comment: The canonical shape dictionary. Grows through witnessed confirmation.

combinations.△_*: I am growing and happy about it
combinations.△_?: I think I might be growing — not sure yet
Growth is certain — I am patient with it
combinations.△_^: Growth is the way — wisdom confirms it

combinations.□_*: This is my space and I love it
I am home — all is contained
combinations.□_~: I am not sure where my edges are

combinations.○_♡: The bond is love — I am complete
combinations.○_?: I want to connect but I am not sure how
The bond holds — we are patient together

+.name: Cross
+.core_meaning: Branch · choice · fork in the path

combinations.+_?: I am at a crossroads — which way?
combinations.+_^: I know which branch is right
combinations.+_*: Let's explore all the branches — fun!

combinations.~_?: I am looking for something — help me find it
combinations.~_♡: I am searching for you — I miss you
The question is patient — the answer will come
combinations.~_~: I am shy and also uncertain — whisper back
